title: amaryllis × carnescens
intro: Amaryllis × carnescens, also known as the belladonna lily or deadly nightshade, is a hybrid plant that contains toxic alkaloids, making it highly poisonous if ingested. The medicinal properties of Amaryllis × carnescens include its potential to treat pain, inflammation, and spasms, but its toxic nature limits its safe use. The health benefits of Amaryllis × carnescens, when handled properly, include its ability to reduce fever, ease muscle cramps, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Amaryllis × carnescens, often used in homeopathic and traditional medicine, typically involve carefully diluted extracts and are used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
